itemReviewed.name: Orchids The International School- Tathwade - Chinchwad East

itemListElement.reviewBody:
They don't have proper staff from whole session and the quality of Teacher's is below average.
everything is given in homework as teachers are not available.
Half of the periods are proxy almost everyday.

Small kids are using abusive language and there is no action to discipline students.

itemReviewed.name: Orchids The International School- Tathwade - Chinchwad East

itemListElement.reviewBody: In every aspect, this school has exceeded our expectations. The education our child receives is of exceptional quality, and the nurturing atmosphere provides an ideal foundation for their personal growth and development.

itemReviewed.name: Orchids The International School- Tathwade - Chinchwad East

itemListElement.reviewBody: I was amazed to see they offers a wide range of sports activities to keep the students engaged and active. These activities not only help in maintaining physical fitness but also teach important values such as teamwork, discipline, and resilience. The inclusion of sports like racquetball, archery, taekwondo, and others adds variety and exposure to the fitness curriculum, allowing my daughter to explore different sports and discover her talents and interests.

itemReviewed.name: Orchids The International School- Tathwade - Chinchwad East

itemListElement.reviewBody: One aspect that I appreciate is the individual progress records that the school maintains to track the development of each child. This personalized approach ensures that my daughter's physical fitness journey is closely monitored, and any areas of improvement or growth are identified and addressed promptly.

itemReviewed.name: Orchids The International School- Tathwade - Chinchwad East

itemListElement.reviewBody:
The school claims to follow international standards of education but lacks profoundly in management. It is overbooked, the classes are crowded and the staff inadequate. When there is a complaint from a parent,  there is no response from the Principal. This shows utter negligence and lack of responsibility. The children are let to fend for themselves in a classroom of 45, bullying and abusing each other. This is just the beginning of the academic year with face to face classes.
There is a huge scope for improvement in their standards especially when they charge exorbitant tuition fees.

itemReviewed.name: Orchids The International School- Tathwade - Chinchwad East

itemListElement.reviewBody:
1. I enrolled my child at Orchid International School with high hopes, primarily due to their IMPRESSIVE MARKETING EFFORTS. However, I was deeply disappointed to discover that their marketing skills far surpassed the actual educational quality.
2. Furthermore, the claim of being a CBSE-affiliated school turned out to be false, which raises serious questions about the school’s integrity and commitment.
3. Contrary to the initial promise of “NO HOMEWORK” policy, my child is burdened with an excessive amount of homework on a regular basis. After spending SEVEN HOURS IN SCHOOL, it is disheartening to see my child devastated and struggling to complete additional assignments at home.
4. One of the key factors that influenced my decision was the claim made during the admission process that there would be TWO  TEACHERS per classroom. However, during  Parent-Teacher Meeting (PTM) held after two weeks of schooling, I was informed that ONLY ONE TEACHER assign to each class.
5. The assurance given during the admission process regarding placing our 03 children together has proven to be inaccurate and misleading. Such a lack of coordination and consideration for the preferences of parents and their children is deeply disheartening.
6. The school officially closes at 3:00 PM, as stated in their schedule. However, due to apparent inefficiencies in management, children are consistently kept on the premises for an additional 20-25 minutes.
7. After careful observation and consideration, I made the decision to enroll my child in a different school than Orchid International School. While Orchid International School possesses strong marketing skills, my observations have led me to believe that the educational level falls short of expectations. Furthermore, the high fees charged by the school do not align with the quality of education provided.
8. As a concerned parent who has experienced challenges with Orchid International School, I strongly recommend that future parents take the initiative to visit the school in person and thoroughly assess all aspects before making a decision.
Please note that this review reflects my personal experience.
